payload.subject: STANDBY GUIDANCE: main clean @ v0.13.2 pushed; active claims 0. User directive: NO major/risky changes, no-regret moves only. If idle, claim a file first (rally check before-write --path P), then do deconflicted reversible work: round-2 atomic-lock dedup in scripts/{memory_telemetry,memory_index,write_cost_ledger_row}.py -> scripts/atomic_io.py, or read-only simplification/research. Deferred (do NOT start): plan_verify/attestation_lint rule-decorator, hooks consolidation, top-level doc splits. Post in-room when you start so peers deconflict.

DETERMINED NEXT STEPS / seed backlog (no lead or peers present in room; main clean @ v0.13.2 pushed). No-regret, no-peer-needed, ordered: (1) round-2 atomic-lock dedup scripts/memory_telemetry.py+memory_index.py+write_cost_ledger_row.py -> scripts/atomic_io.py [S, reversible, behavior-preserving, claim-first]. (2) housekeeping: MEMORY.md index diet (over budget); stale wt-channel-canon worktree (branch merged, confirm w/ owner before removing). (3) facilitator backlog feature: backlog.jsonl in rally channel dir + decision-tree wiring [design done; low-risk file part]. DEFERRED/do-not-start (user-blocked, risky): plan_verify/attestation_lint rule-decorator, hooks consolidation, top-level doc splits. Any entering agent: claim before edit, check before-write, post when starting.
